title: cyclopeltis rigida
intro: Cyclopeltis rigida, also known as the prickly cyclopeltis, is a type of climbing fern native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, thanks to its analgesic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, cyclopeltis rigida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal benefits.
